sentences.arabic: سَمِعَتِ الْأُمُّ الْمَثَلَ: «رُبَّ صَغِيرَةٍ أَطَاحَتْ بِكَبِيرَةٍ».
sentences.translation: Majka je čula poslovicu: «Ponekad mala stvar obori veliku».
sentences.translationEn: The mother heard the proverb: «Sometimes a small thing topples a big one».

sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي هَذَا أَنَّ التَّفَاصِيلَ الصَّغِيرَةَ مُهِمَّةٌ جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: To znači da su mali detalji veoma važni.
sentences.translationEn: This means that small details are very important.

sentences.translation: Kuhar je zaboravio dodati sol u hranu.
sentences.translationEn: The cook forgot to add salt to the food.

sentences.arabic: لَمْ يَكُنِ الطَّعَامُ لَذِيذًا بِسَبَبِ هَذِهِ التَّفْصِيلَةِ الصَّغِيرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Hrana nije bila ukusna zbog tog malog detalja.
sentences.translationEn: The food was not tasty because of this small detail.
